about_section.title: About me
about_section.content_1:
I’m a Full-Stack Software Engineer with a background in Computer Systems Engineering focused on building scalable web platforms, real-time systems, and automation-driven applications. I work across the full stack — from designing performant frontend interfaces to developing backend services, real-time communication layers, and production systems that support modern interactive products.

My experience includes developing operational tools, analytics dashboards, media rendering workflows, and synchronized real-time platforms using technologies like React, TypeScript, Node.js, Firebase, and WebSockets. I focus on building reliable systems, maintainable architectures, and user experiences that solve real operational and engagement challenges.
